name: Beyond the Void
short_description: Beyond the Void is a new hybrid strategy game in space, with RTS and MOBA mechanics. It's F2P. Experience the thrill of being a Captain and lead epic space wars in 1 vs1. Design your own strategy and fleet to become the one who'll dominate the galaxy!
detailed_description:
Beyond the Void is a new hybrid strategy game in space which returns to the MOBA genre and its RTS origins in a 1 vs 1 space war. Beyond the Void is a unique combination of strategy, action and competition. Venture out into a new galaxy and experience the thrill of being a Captain! Select your flagship and its capabilities. You have only one true goal: design and build an invincible fleet to conquer your opponent’s home planet! Now Captain, board your flagship and combine your strategy and resources to take the war beyond the void. Become the next warlord!


  • Challenge your friends to 1 vs 1 online matches, train against the AI or compete in ranked games and tournaments.
  • First, SELECT the capabilities of your flagship to match your strategy.
  • GATHER resources and conquer neutral planets as you build your fleet and improve your flagship’s statistics.
  • DESTROY your opponent’s fleet as you lead your powerful army in an epic space war. Your skills as a player are your best weapon.
  • DOMINATE the game and defeat the enemy by conquering their home planet. Your victory is the first step on the way to enhancing your reputation among the BTV community. Fight your way to the top of the rankings!

Follow us on Discord and let us know your thoughts!

The BTV Team.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Russian, German, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
